desc: A sturdy guard in leather armor, bronze shortsword at the hip and a round wooden shield slung on one arm. Alert eyes scan the approaches beyond the gate.
A keen-eyed guard in leather armor, a shortbow held ready with a quiver of arrows at the hip. Stationed to cover the approaches to the gate.
A grizzled veteran in studded leather, a massive bronze greatsword resting across broad shoulders. Scars crisscross weathered forearms. This one has seen real fighting.
